CustomField.formula: (5 * ( FLOOR( ( End_Date__c - DATETIMEVALUE( '1900-01-08 00:00:00' ) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( End_Date__c - DATETIMEVALUE( '1900-01-08 00:00:00' ), 7 ) ) ) - (5 * ( FLOOR( ( Start_Date__c- DATETIMEVALUE( '1900-01-08 00:00:00' ) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( Start_Date__c - DATETIMEVALUE( '1900-01-08 00:00:00' ), 7 ) ) )
CustomField.label: TAT
